description: Information Security Engineers frequently build 'First Time Seen' detections to identify compromised accounts or insider threats. Using Splunk (http://localhost:8000, admin/SplunkAdmin1!), implement a two-stage detection mechanism consisting of a baseline report and a deviation alert. The report, named 'Baseline_Known_User_IPs', must baseline unique 'user' and 'src_ip' pairs from successful logins in 'security_logs' into a lookup file named 'known_user_ips.csv'. The alert, named 'First_Time_Seen_Login_Alert', must trigger on successful logins in 'security_logs' where the user and source IP combination does not exist in the 'known_user_ips.csv' lookup.
